label: NAV Summary
description: Total NAV, available (free) capital, and locked (in-use) capital aggregated across all venues.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.8.note: Error state: error guard with error.message.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. No fixes required this pass.

1.1.note: Data from useAccountsData() — no inline fetch.

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope(); filters by organizationIds.

1.3.note: orgVenues memo filters balances by org-owned venues.

1.4.note: Accounts domain scopes to org only; no client sub-filter.

1.5.note: No strategy dimension for account balances.

1.7.note: Widget imports nothing from lib/mocks/. Context uses ACCOUNTS for org-venue mapping (flagged as tech debt, context-level, not widget-level).

l1.notes: Clean data flow. 1.4/1.5 N/A — accounts domain has no client or strategy filter axis.

l2.notes: Globally satisfied per spec §L2 2026-04-17 update. Commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea cover all 17 domains. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (primary), paper ✓ (venue suffix appended), batch ✓ (T+1 suffix appended). Context reads isPaper/isBatch from useExecutionMode().

3.2.note: Context reads isPaper/isBatch via useExecutionMode() and applies venue label suffix in paper/batch modes.

3.5.note: Paper mode: balances show venue names suffixed with '(Paper)'. Widget displays correctly — no functional change needed.

3.6.note: KPI strip is read-only; no WebSocket/polling intervals to disable in batch mode.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3 N/A (widget is display-only, no order entry). 3.4 requires human walkthrough — layout-level batch indicator pending human confirmation.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks on render path — handled by registry layer.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 human-verified — widget is read-only with no forms or collapsibles.

5.1.note: Target strategies: none — account-level KPI strip, not strategy-specific. Serves all strategies indirectly via portfolio-wide NAV/free/locked capital.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented. 5.2–5.6 N/A — display-only widget with no execution parameters.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests not written this pass.

7.2.note: No mock imports in widget file.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect. KpiMetric array constructed inline inside render — trivial, not a perf concern at 3 items.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.3.note: Uses Skeleton from components/ui. Delegates to KpiSummaryWidget shared primitive.

8.4.note:
Agent: no without alt, no interactive
, no unlabelled . Human keyboard/screen-reader pass pending.

8.5.note: Human resize test at minW=3/minH=1 pending.

l8.notes: 8.1–8.3 clean, no fixes needed. 8.4/8.5 require human walkthrough.

keepSeparate.rationale: KPI strip is a singleton summary row. Merging with balance table would lose the condensed 1-row overview at the top of the accounts layout.

relationships.notes: Reads from same AccountsDataProvider as all accounts widgets. No selection coupling.

dataContract.mockSource: lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data (via accounts-data-context; ACCOUNTS for org-venue mapping)
dataContract.notes: Balances fetched via useBalances() hook (REST). KPI values (totalNAV/totalFree/totalLocked) are derived in context from balance records.

gaps: No DeFi/TradFi on-chain balance aggregation — venue list is CeFi-only in mock data
coverage.notes: Widget is venue-agnostic by design; gaps reflect mock data scope, not widget capability.

knownIssues: accounts-data-context.tsx imports ACCOUNTS from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data for org→venue mapping (not balance data) and MOCK_SAFTS for SAFT demo records. These are intentional fixture uses but should be moved to lib/constants/ or lib/config/ in a future cleanup pass.

findings.description: accounts-kpi-widget.tsx — ~5 user-visible strings not wrapped in i18n helpers
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
